//: M11.2 web app compile config. `tsc --noEmit`. The @quantize/* alias imports the committed generated declarations in ../ts (CLAUDE.md invariant 4 — never re-declare a domain type).
//paths: No `baseUrl` (deprecated, removed in TS 7.0): since TS 4.1 `paths` resolves relative to this file's directory, so `../ts/*` still maps to the committed generated declarations. Vite mirrors this via its own resolve.alias in vite.config.ts.
//exclude: The app config is the browser-safety guardrail: it excludes the test files and the test-only Node ambient shim, so browser app code CANNOT reference process/node:fs and pass. Tests are type-checked by tsconfig.test.json (which includes the shim).
